arts.sum: Aston Villa is delighted to announce the signing of Andrés García from Levante. The full-back joins Villa for an undisclosed fee. Energetic and with an eye for goal, he has registered three goals and three assists so far this season. Capable of operating at right-back or further up the flank, the 21-year-old native of Valencia came through the ranks at Levante before breaking into the first team. Welcome, Andrés! 🇪🇸

arts.ttl: From Portugal: Wolves consider proposal for Sporting player, Fulham and Aston Villa also keen
arts.sum: Not to be deterred after losing out on Manu Silva to Benfica at the last minute, Wolves are returning to fish in the Portuguese transfer pond. Tuesday’s edition of O Jogo reports Wolves have been considering presenting a proposal to Sporting CP to sign Geny Catamo. arts.ttl: AS Monaco vs Aston Villa – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa face AS Monaco for the first time ever in the penultimate round of the Uefa Champions League league phase on Tuesday. The Villans can virtually confirm their place in the last 16 with victory in the microstate as they currently sit in 4th place in the league standings. arts.sum: On Monday, we carried claims from Spain regarding Aston Villa’s initial offer for Loïc Badé. Diego Costa heading off for new horizons in the Turkish Super Lig meant the Premier League club were able to move more concretely for the Sevilla player. arts.ttl: Unai Emery lifts lid on 'very important' conversation with Youri Tielemans
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery believes Youri Tielemans' best qualities are "his mind and his mentality". After a slow start last season, the Belgian now believes he is playing the best football of his career and Emery has hailed his commitment in striving for improvement after hitting a low point in his career 20 months ago.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa XI vs Monaco – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa travel to Monaco on Tuesday evening with Champions League qualification in their grasp. Unai Emery’s side are fifth in the standings and in the automatic qualification places. A win in the principality will consolidate their position ahead of the final round of league phase fixtures. arts.ttl: 'Everyone knows it' - Ezri Konsa makes Tyrone Mings point after return from injury - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: "I don’t think we have lost a game since I’ve played alongside him [this season] so to have him back, it’s a great feeling. Aston Villa's Ezri Konsa has praised Tyrone Mings' 'amazing' performances since he returned from a devastating ACL injury at the start of last season.
